general_guidelines.philosophy: Digital Stage: High-contrast, immersive, electric. The user is the performer, the screen is the stage.
universal_rules: Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
Dark colors must be solid or subtle noise, not muddy gradients.
Glassmorphism with high blur (24px+) for overlays.
All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H3. Letter-spacing tight (-0.02em). Uppercase for H3/Labels.

body.usage: Use for paragraphs, UI text, and data inputs.

code.usage: For API keys, code snippets, or 'technical' aesthetics.

primary.name: Electric Indigo
primary.usage: Primary CTAs, active states, brand accents.

secondary.name: Neon Mint
secondary.usage: Success states, profit metrics, 'Live' indicators, highlights.

layout.spacing_scale: Generous. Use p-8, p-12, p-16 for section padding.

buttons.primary: bg-[#5D5CFF] text-white hover:bg-[#4B4ACF] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold transition-transform hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(93,92,255,0.4)]
buttons.secondary: border border-[#5D5CFF] text-[#5D5CFF] hover:bg-[#5D5CFF]/10 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold
buttons.ghost: text-zinc-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 rounded-full px-4 py-2

cards.style: bg-[#121212] border border-white/5 hover:border-[#5D5CFF]/30 transition-colors duration-300
cards.hover_effect: The 'Tracing Beam' - subtle glow on border hover.

inputs.style: bg-[#0A0A0A] border-white/10 focus:border-[#5D5CFF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#5D5CFF] text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600 rounded-lg h-12

navigation.style: Glassmorphism. bg-[#0A0A0A]/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5 fixed w-full z-50 top-0

effects: Noise Texture: Overlay a subtle CSS noise pattern on the background (opacity 0.03).
Glows: Use colored drop-shadows instead of black shadows for neon elements.
Marquee: Use slow-moving 'editorial ribbons' for partner logos or tickers.

motion.scrolling: lenis (smooth scrolling) is MANDATORY for marketing pages.

icons.usage: Use Duotone for marketing, Regular for UI. Color: White or Neon Mint for active states.

images.alt: Abstract neon lights in dark field

tech_stack.3d: Spline (optional for hero) or CSS 3D Transforms

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add 'Unbounded' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts to index.html immediately.
2. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js with the 'Electric Indigo' (#5D5CFF) and 'Neon Mint' (#00FF94) colors.
3. GLOBAL CSS: Set body background to #0A0A0A and text to #FFFFFF in index.css.
4. COMPONENTS: When building the dashboard, do NOT use Cards for everything. Use 'Grid Borders' style for data tables.
5. MOCK DATA: Never use Lorem Ipsum. Use realistic music/creator data (e.g., 'Live Now: Synthwave Sessions', 'Ticket Sales: $12,400').
6. IMAGES: Use the provided Unsplash/Pexels URLs. Do NOT use placeholders.
7. TESTING: Add data-testid to all buttons, inputs, and links.
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetic (generic centered layouts, uniform styling).
NO centered app container (.App { text-align: center }).
